items.title: S01E01 - Episode 1
items.summary: No more insurance. Ronnie and Laura embark on a new life in the company of the Prince of Denmark. Unfortunately, Ronnie's introduction to the world of the publican does not get off to a smooth start.

infolabels.title: Episode 1
infolabels.plot: No more insurance. Ronnie and Laura embark on a new life in the company of the Prince of Denmark. Unfortunately, Ronnie's introduction to the world of the publican does not get off to a smooth start.

items.title: S01E02 - Episode 2
items.summary: Ronnie has trouble with the flaps to the cellar, and the brewery's delivery men. Mr. Yates stops by to talk to the Corbetts afresh, and Ronnie's really put to the test when an impatient customer threatens violence.

infolabels.title: Episode 2
infolabels.plot: Ronnie has trouble with the flaps to the cellar, and the brewery's delivery men. Mr. Yates stops by to talk to the Corbetts afresh, and Ronnie's really put to the test when an impatient customer threatens violence.

items.title: S01E03 - Episode 3
items.summary: There's more to being a landlord than selling drinks: he's a shoulder, an ear, a mouth... When Ronnie attempts to console a fed-up face, he and Laura quickly assume the roles of marriage counsellor!

infolabels.title: Episode 3
infolabels.plot: There's more to being a landlord than selling drinks: he's a shoulder, an ear, a mouth... When Ronnie attempts to console a fed-up face, he and Laura quickly assume the roles of marriage counsellor!

items.title: S01E04 - Episode 4
items.summary: Saturday night in a pub can be noisy. Ronnie thinks chaps who play rugger are all right, but the football fans...

infolabels.title: Episode 4
infolabels.plot: Saturday night in a pub can be noisy. Ronnie thinks chaps who play rugger are all right, but the football fans...

items.title: S01E05 - Episode 5
items.summary: It's another very quiet night in The Prince of Denmark and Ronnie's wondering how they might drum up business; they've yet to even take enough to pay Steve and Polly's wages. Things start livening up slightly when a hoax fire call is made, and a pregnant lady and her husband turn up.

items.title: S01E06 - Episode 6
items.summary: Ronnie's heard a rumour that brewery managing director Mr Parsons may be paying the pub a visit. Can their customers keep our hero in big with the brewery?
